title: gunpowder+
description: this is. a mod that adds a gunpowder ore that when mined drops raw gunpowder which can be made into gun powder
body:
so the instructions to do everything are:
1. find the ore and mine it
2. the ore should drop raw gunpowder take that and put it in a crafting table

want more features then check me out on pmc(planet minecraft) and message me

link:https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/neomorph/
